title: Classification and Sources of E-Waste
description: A flowchart categorizing the major types of electronic waste and tracing their common sources.
relationships: Consumer Electronics sources include: Smartphones, Televisions, Computers
IT & Telecom sources include: Servers, Routers, Printers
Large Appliances sources include: Refrigerators, Washing Machines, Air Conditioners
Small Appliances sources include: Microwaves, Toasters, Vacuum Cleaners
Medical Equipment sources include: Monitors, Scanners, Analysis Equipment
Toys & Leisure sources include: Game Consoles, Drones, Electric Toys
